examples: She was getting into trouble over playing truant from school.
In his small studio on West 37th Street, Mr. Wu, wore a cardigan and a necktie and looked like a truant from a boarding school.
I have been nothing but a truant and a vagabond.
Children who played truant were being condemned to a life of unemployment and crime, he said.
The truant is young Sam Shakusky (Jared Gilman), and he has gone to find Suzy.
